name: Colored Panel
description: A colored panel covers a 3x3 area on the grid, hiding the boxes underneath. Sort marbles of the matching color to count it down and reveal what's hidden!
howToPlay: Tap the green boxes first and sort all their marbles. Each time a green sort box clears, the green panel's number decreases. When it reaches 0, the panel shatters and reveals the hidden boxes underneath. Then tap those to finish the level!
author: Claude

showcaseLevel.name: Panel Demo
showcaseLevel.desc: Clear the green panel to reveal hidden boxes
